title: salvia pratensis var. agrestis
intro: Salvia pratensis var. agrestis, also known as wild meadow sage, is a perennial plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its gray-green leaves and purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of various flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Salvia pratensis var. agrestis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
